B

Ballot - Class in p2main
Abstract class representing Ballot for election.
Ballot(int[]) - Constructor for class p2main.Ballot
Constructor for Ballot.
BallotFileReader - Class in p2main
Class for reading and processing ballot data from ballot file.
BallotFileReader() - Constructor for class p2main.BallotFileReader
Default constructor for BallotFileReader.
breakTie(List<Integer>) - Method in class p2main.MunicipalAlgorithm
Breaks a tie by randomly selecting a number of candidates equal to the number of remaining seats.
breakTie(List<Integer>) - Method in class p2main.PluralityAlgorithm
Breaks ties by randomly ordering tied candidates.
breakTie(List<Integer>) - Method in class p2main.STVAlgorithm
Breaks ties between candidates using ballot timestamp logic.
breakTie(List<Integer>) - Method in class p2main.VotingAlgorithm
Breaks a tie between candidates in case of equal votes.

C

calculateDroopQuota(int, int) - Method in class p2main.STVAlgorithm
Calculates the minimum votes needed to win a seat (Droop quota).
counterList - Variable in class p2main.MunicipalAlgorithm
Stores the number of votes each candidate received.
counterList - Variable in class p2main.PluralityAlgorithm
Stores the number of votes each candidate received.
counterList - Variable in class p2main.STVAlgorithm
Array of lists tracking ballots assigned to each candidate

D

displayResults() - Method in class p2main.MunicipalAlgorithm
Displays the final election results, including vote totals for each winner and loser.
displayResults() - Method in class p2main.PluralityAlgorithm
Displays the election results to the console.
displayResults() - Method in class p2main.STVAlgorithm
 
displayResults() - Method in class p2main.VotingAlgorithm
Displays the results of the election.
droopQuota - Variable in class p2main.STVAlgorithm
The minimum votes required to win a seat (Droop quota)

E

electedList - Variable in class p2main.STVAlgorithm
Ordered map of elected candidates (candidate index → vote count)
election - Variable in class p2main.MunicipalAlgorithm
The election object containing candidates and ballots.
election - Variable in class p2main.PluralityAlgorithm
The election object containing candidates and ballots.
election - Variable in class p2main.STVAlgorithm
The election instance being processed
election - Variable in class p2main.VotingAlgorithm
The election associated with this voting algorithm.
Election - Class in p2main
Election is the main driver class of the voting system.

gets election type

gets number of seats
getPreference() - Method in class p2main.STVBallot

getVote() - Method in class p2main.Ballot

getVotingAlgorithm() - Method in class p2main.Election

Increments the preference of the ballot for redistribution.

Implements the Plurality voting algorithm.

processBallotFile(BallotFileReader) - Method in class p2main.Election
Process the ballots from the ballot files.
promptForInput(Scanner, BallotFileReader) - Method in class p2main.Election
Prompts user for a ballot file name and parses the file's header to initialize election information variables

R

readBallots(String, String, int) - Method in class p2main.BallotFileReader
Reads ballot from given ballot file.
readHeader(String) - Method in class p2main.BallotFileReader
Reads the header of the ballot file
redistributeCandidateBallots(List<Ballot>) - Method in class p2main.STVAlgorithm
Manages the core STV process including: - Call shuffleBallots() - Distribute all ballot to allCandidate - Election of candidates who reach quota - Call redistributeSurplusBallots() - Call eliminateWeakestCandidate() - Call determineWinnersAndLosers()
runAlgorithm(List<Ballot>) - Method in class p2main.MunicipalAlgorithm
Executes the municipal voting algorithm: 1.
runAlgorithm(List<Ballot>) - Method in class p2main.PluralityAlgorithm
 
runAlgorithm(List<Ballot>) - Method in class p2main.STVAlgorithm
Executes the STV voting algorithm.
runAlgorithm(List<Ballot>) - Method in class p2main.VotingAlgorithm
Runs the voting algorithm on the given list of ballots.

S

setCandidates(String[]) - Method in class p2main.Election
Sets the candidates for the election.
shuffleBallots(List<Ballot>, boolean) - Method in class p2main.STVAlgorithm
Shuffles the list of ballots if shuffle is true.
sortCanList - Variable in class p2main.MunicipalAlgorithm
Sorted list of candidate names based on votes.
sortCanList - Variable in class p2main.PluralityAlgorithm
Sorted list of candidate names based on votes.
sortVoteList - Variable in class p2main.PluralityAlgorithm
Sorted list of vote counts corresponding to `sortCanList`.
STVAlgorithm - Class in p2main
STVAlgorithm class implementing the STV voting method.

Class extending Ballot that represents an stv election ballot.
